narrative:
Sharonville 4-A (precinct in Hamilton County) has 1,298 registered voters, with 47.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 33.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 14.9 percentage points.
